content.text:
💧 Ethereum's liquid staking dominance is underrated.

Current staking landscape:
• ~28% of all ETH staked (~34M ETH)
• Lido dominance: ~28% of staked ETH
• Restaking via EigenLayer: $15B+ TVL
• Liquid staking yields: 3.2% base APY
• Restaking premiums: 5.2-13.2% total yield

The LST (liquid staking token) ecosystem has become Ethereum's shadow banking system. stETH, rETH, cbETH — all creating composable yield instruments.

What's next? EigenLayer AVS launches accelerating. Yield from AVS fees will stack on consensus yield.

Restaking isn't a fad — it's Ethereum's yield layer maturing.
content.call_to_action: Follow for weekly restaking yield updates

metadata.target_audience: DeFi users, yield seekers, Ethereum builders
